description_long: This is a modern claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head with a dual-purpose design: a flat striking face for driving nails and a curved claw for prying and removing nails. The handle is elongated and appears to be constructed from a composite material, likely fiberglass or metal, and is covered with a black and yellow rubberized ergonomic grip for enhanced comfort and slip resistance. The grip section is decorated with yellow accents and textured patterns, providing both visual appeal and functional anti-slip properties. The hammer head is finished in a matte black, with the claw section sharply defined and the striking face slightly rounded. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for heavy-duty urban or construction tasks. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present, and the hammer appears to be in pristine condition.
description: A modern claw hammer with a black metal head and a black-and-yellow rubberized ergonomic handle, featuring a textured anti-slip grip and a pristine finish.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown from a side angle, highlighting the curved claw and the rounded striking face, with the ergonomic handle and yellow grip details visible.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the full length of the handle, showcasing the yellow grip accents and the overall straight alignment of the hammer.
description_view_2: The hammer is viewed from the handle end, focusing on the grip's textured pattern and the cylindrical shape, with the head less visible.
description_view_3: A reverse side view, displaying the opposite profile of the head and handle, with the claw and grip details still apparent.
attribute_handle_type: Rubberized ergonomic grip handle with black and yellow textured anti-slip patterns, straight and slightly contoured for comfort, likely over a fiberglass or metal core.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a sharply curved claw for nail removal, finished in matte black.
